name: GDPR
description: Comprehensive paraphrased GDPR self-assessment checklist for MVP use. This is not legal advice and not official legal text.

sections.title: Governance and accountability
sections.description: Management ownership, accountability, roles, documentation and governance of data protection work.

requirements.question: Does the company maintain an overview of personal data processing activities?
requirements.description: Check whether the company has records of processing activities, including purposes, categories of data, recipients and retention.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Does the company maintain an overview of personal data processing activities?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 30.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Has internal responsibility for GDPR compliance been assigned?
requirements.description: Assess whether GDPR ownership is clearly assigned to relevant roles or functions.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Has internal responsibility for GDPR compliance been assigned?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 5(2).
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Are privacy policies and procedures documented and maintained?
requirements.description: Check whether privacy procedures are written, available and periodically reviewed.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Are privacy policies and procedures documented and maintained?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR accountability principle.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Does management review data protection risks and compliance status?
requirements.description: Assess whether privacy risks and compliance gaps are reported to relevant management.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Does management review data protection risks and compliance status?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 24.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Are employees aware of their data protection responsibilities?
requirements.description: Check whether employees handling personal data receive guidance or training.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Are employees aware of their data protection responsibilities?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 39 / accountability.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Is there a process for identifying when a Data Protection Officer is required?
requirements.description: Assess whether the company has evaluated if DPO appointment is required based on its processing activities.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Is there a process for identifying when a Data Protection Officer is required?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 37-39.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

sections.title: Lawful basis and processing principles
sections.description: Lawfulness, fairness, transparency, purpose limitation, minimisation, accuracy, retention and integrity.

requirements.question: Is a lawful basis defined for each processing activity?
requirements.description: Verify that each processing activity has a documented lawful basis such as contract, legal obligation, consent or legitimate interest.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Is a lawful basis defined for each processing activity?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 6.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Are special categories of personal data identified and justified?
requirements.description: Check whether sensitive data processing has a valid legal condition and documented safeguards.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Are special categories of personal data identified and justified?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 9.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Are processing purposes clearly defined before personal data is collected?
requirements.description: Assess whether data is only collected for specific, explicit and legitimate purposes.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Are processing purposes clearly defined before personal data is collected?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 5(1)(b).
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Is data minimisation applied in systems and processes?
requirements.description: Check whether only necessary personal data is collected and used.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Is data minimisation applied in systems and processes?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 5(1)(c).
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Are procedures in place to keep personal data accurate and up to date?
requirements.description: Assess whether inaccurate or outdated personal data is corrected or deleted.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Are procedures in place to keep personal data accurate and up to date?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 5(1)(d).
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Are retention periods defined for personal data?
requirements.description: Check whether personal data is deleted or anonymised when no longer needed.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Are retention periods defined for personal data?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 5(1)(e).
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Are legitimate interest assessments performed where relevant?
requirements.description: Assess whether balancing tests are documented when legitimate interest is used.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Are legitimate interest assessments performed where relevant?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 6(1)(f).
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

sections.title: Transparency and privacy notices
sections.description: Information provided to data subjects about processing, rights, retention, recipients and contact points.

requirements.question: Are privacy notices available to relevant data subjects?
requirements.description: Check whether customers, employees, users or other data subjects receive clear privacy information.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Are privacy notices available to relevant data subjects?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 12-14.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Are privacy notices written in clear and understandable language?
requirements.description: Assess whether information is concise, transparent and easy to understand.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Are privacy notices written in clear and understandable language?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 12.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Do privacy notices describe purposes, lawful bases and data categories?
requirements.description: Verify whether notices explain what data is processed and why.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Do privacy notices describe purposes, lawful bases and data categories?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 13-14.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Do privacy notices explain data subject rights?
requirements.description: Check whether rights such as access, rectification, deletion, restriction and objection are described.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Do privacy notices explain data subject rights?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 13-14.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Are recipients, processors and transfer information described where relevant?
requirements.description: Assess whether data sharing and international transfer information is provided.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Are recipients, processors and transfer information described where relevant?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 13-14.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

sections.title: Consent and preference management
sections.description: Use, documentation and withdrawal of consent where consent is the legal basis.

requirements.question: Is consent only used where it is appropriate and freely given?
requirements.description: Assess whether consent is suitable for the processing context and not forced.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Is consent only used where it is appropriate and freely given?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 7.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Is consent documented and traceable?
requirements.description: Check whether the company can demonstrate when and how consent was obtained.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Is consent documented and traceable?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 7(1).
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Can consent be withdrawn as easily as it was given?
requirements.description: Verify that withdrawal mechanisms are available and effective.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Can consent be withdrawn as easily as it was given?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 7(3).
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Are marketing preferences and opt-outs respected?
requirements.description: Assess whether opt-outs are recorded and applied across relevant systems.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Are marketing preferences and opt-outs respected?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 21 / ePrivacy context.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

sections.title: Data subject rights
sections.description: Processes for handling access, correction, deletion, portability, restriction and objection requests.

requirements.question: Can the company handle access requests within required timelines?
requirements.description: Check whether a documented process exists for responding to data subject access requests.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Can the company handle access requests within required timelines?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 15.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Can the company handle rectification requests?
requirements.description: Assess whether inaccurate personal data can be corrected efficiently.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Can the company handle rectification requests?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 16.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Can the company assess and handle deletion requests?
requirements.description: Check whether deletion requests can be evaluated and fulfilled where applicable.

requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 17.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Can the company restrict processing when required?
requirements.description: Assess whether systems and procedures support restriction of processing.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Can the company restrict processing when required?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 18.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Can the company handle data portability requests where relevant?
requirements.description: Check whether personal data can be exported in a structured and commonly used format where applicable.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Can the company handle data portability requests where relevant?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 20.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Can the company handle objections to processing?
requirements.description: Assess whether objections, especially to direct marketing or legitimate interest processing, are handled.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Can the company handle objections to processing?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 21.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Are rights requests documented and tracked?
requirements.description: Verify whether requests, decisions and response dates are logged.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Are rights requests documented and tracked?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 12.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

sections.title: Processors and third parties
sections.description: Processor agreements, vendor governance, sub-processors and shared responsibility.

requirements.question: Are all processors handling personal data identified?
requirements.description: Check whether the company maintains a list of processors and data flows.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Are all processors handling personal data identified?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 28.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Are data processing agreements in place with processors?

requirements.description: Check whether sub-processor use is transparent and contractually regulated.

requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 28(2)-(4).
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Are joint controller arrangements identified where relevant?
requirements.description: Assess whether shared controller responsibilities are documented.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Are joint controller arrangements identified where relevant?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 26.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Are processors monitored periodically?
requirements.description: Check whether vendor compliance is reviewed through questionnaires, evidence or audits.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Are processors monitored periodically?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 28.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

sections.title: International transfers
sections.description: Transfers outside the EU/EEA, safeguards and transfer risk assessments.

requirements.question: Are international transfers of personal data identified?
requirements.description: Check whether transfers outside the EU/EEA are mapped.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Are international transfers of personal data identified?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Chapter V.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Are appropriate transfer mechanisms used?
requirements.description: Assess whether SCCs, adequacy decisions or other safeguards are used where required.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Are appropriate transfer mechanisms used?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 44-49.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Are transfer risk assessments performed where relevant?
requirements.description: Check whether risks related to third-country transfers are considered.

requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Chapter V / EDPB guidance.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Are international transfer details reflected in privacy notices and records?
requirements.description: Assess whether transfer information is documented and communicated.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Are international transfer details reflected in privacy notices and records?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 13-14, 30.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

sections.title: Security of processing
sections.description: Technical and organisational measures to protect personal data.

requirements.question: Are access controls applied to systems processing personal data?
requirements.description: Assess whether access is role-based, approved and reviewed.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Are access controls applied to systems processing personal data?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 32.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Is MFA used for systems with sensitive or high-risk personal data?

requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 32.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.description: Assess whether technical weaknesses are identified and remediated.

requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 32.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Are logs collected for systems processing personal data?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 32.

requirements.description: Assess whether controls are evaluated and improved over time.

sections.title: Privacy by design and DPIA
sections.description: Built-in data protection, risk assessments and high-risk processing controls.

requirements.question: Is data protection considered when new systems or processes are designed?
requirements.description: Check whether privacy requirements are included early in projects.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Is data protection considered when new systems or processes are designed?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 25.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Are default settings privacy-friendly?
requirements.description: Assess whether systems minimise data collection, visibility and retention by default.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Are default settings privacy-friendly?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 25.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 35.

requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 35.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Is prior consultation considered where residual high risk remains?
requirements.description: Check whether escalation to a supervisory authority is considered when required.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Is prior consultation considered where residual high risk remains?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 36.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.description: Assess whether employees know how to identify and escalate suspected breaches.

requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.description: Assess whether notification responsibilities and deadlines are understood.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Can the company notify the supervisory authority within required timelines if needed?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 33.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Can affected individuals be informed where high risk exists?
requirements.description: Check whether communication procedures are defined for high-risk breaches.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Can affected individuals be informed where high risk exists?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 34.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Are breaches documented regardless of whether notification is required?
requirements.description: Verify that breach facts, effects and remedial actions are recorded.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Are breaches documented regardless of whether notification is required?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 33(5).
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Are processors required to notify the controller without undue delay?
requirements.description: Check whether processor contracts and procedures support breach escalation.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Are processors required to notify the controller without undue delay?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 28, 33.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

sections.title: Children, automated decisions and special cases
sections.description: Additional controls for higher-risk or special processing scenarios.

requirements.question: Are children’s data processing activities identified where relevant?
requirements.description: Assess whether additional safeguards are applied when processing children’s data.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Are children’s data processing activities identified where relevant?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 8 / Recitals.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Are automated decision-making activities identified?
requirements.description: Check whether profiling or automated decisions with significant effects are documented.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Are automated decision-making activities identified?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 22.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Are safeguards in place for automated decisions where relevant?
requirements.description: Assess whether human intervention, contesting decisions and transparency are supported.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Are safeguards in place for automated decisions where relevant?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR Art. 22.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.

requirements.question: Are high-risk processing activities reviewed periodically?
requirements.description: Check whether risky processing is reassessed when systems, purposes or data change.
requirements.implementationGuide: Document and implement a control for: "Are high-risk processing activities reviewed periodically?". Review current practice, assign an owner, define the process, and keep evidence updated for GDPR.
requirements.exampleEvidence: Policy, procedure, screenshot, system export, contract, log, or documentation proving compliance with GDPR risk-based approach.
requirements.riskIfMissing: Missing this control increases compliance risk, reduces audit readiness, and may lead to security or regulatory issues.
